'''Elcorth''' was one of two mining colonies founded by the [[Morath]] on the edge of the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]] closest to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The other was [[Kojash]]. Both were overtaken by the [[Yevetha]] during the [[Yevethan Purge|Great Purge]].

[[Enara]] claimed to have been a [[pholikite]] miner here. In fact, she was a [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] from [[J't'p'tan]].
